name: Drip Email Marketing API
what_it_does: Email marketing automation platform focused on ecommerce with REST API — managing subscribers, tags, custom fields, events, and automated workflows, with deep Shopify/WooCommerce integration and behavioral email triggering based on purchase and browse data.
use_cases: Syncing ecommerce customer data (orders, products, behavior) for targeted email automation
Triggering post-purchase, abandoned cart, and browse abandonment email flows via API
Managing subscriber tags and custom fields for segmentation via REST API
Running lifecycle campaigns for ecommerce customers based on purchase history
Integrating Drip with Shopify/WooCommerce for automated revenue-driven email flows
not_for: B2B SaaS lifecycle email — Drip focuses on ecommerce (use Customer.io or Encharge for SaaS)
Transactional email (receipts, order confirmations) — use Postmark or SendGrid
Consumer apps without ecommerce revenue component
best_when: An ecommerce brand needs behavioral email automation deeply integrated with Shopify/WooCommerce, with revenue attribution and purchase-based segmentation.
avoid_when: You run B2B SaaS, need transactional email, or don't have ecommerce revenue data to power behavioral flows.

auth.notes: API token from account settings for direct access. OAuth2 for partner integrations. Account ID required in API path. Token passed as HTTP Basic username. No fine-grained API scopes — account-level access.

pricing.paid_tiers: From $39/month (2,500 subscribers); scales by subscriber count
pricing.notes: Credit card required for trial. Subscriber-based pricing. Ecommerce-focused. Part of Lead Pages/Leadpages ecosystem. Revenue attribution reporting. Shopify integration is primary differentiator. Less advanced than Klaviyo but more affordable.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API covers subscribers, events, campaigns, and forms. OAuth2 for partner integrations. Webhook support for subscriber events. Account ID in URL path is a common gotcha. Documentation adequate but older-style.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Subscriber create/update upsert-style by email — idempotent. Tag operations idempotent. Event tracking creates new records. Campaign management idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Account ID required in every API request URL — not just header
Credit card required for trial — barrier for automated testing
Rate limit of 3,500/hour — aggressive usage patterns may hit limits
Ecommerce-specific features (revenue data) only work with native Shopify/WooCommerce integration

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. US data residency. API token auth with account ID. Domain verification prevents email abuse. No formal certifications beyond GDPR. Leadpages/Drip combined infrastructure.
